geoY.description: Geo location where machine is placed.

dateTimeToShow.description: Date time to show in information text.

insertableUntil.description: Date until the order can be placed into box.

dateTimeToShow.description: Date time to show in information text.

orderValue.description: Value of the order chosen by a customer.

orderNameTranslated.description: Order identification translated to given language.

createdDescriptionTranslated.description: Information about datetime of creation translated to given language.

stateTitleTranslated.description: Title of state in given language.

stateDescriptionTranslated.description: Description of state in given language.

recipientTranslated.description: Information about recipient translated to given language.

isQrStoringAllowed.description: Whether the customer can store his order by scanning a QR code on an AlzaBox.

orderValue.description: Value of the order chosen by a customer.

OrderDocumentOut.description: Order document (invoice or credit note) out object.

primaryButtonText.description: Text of the primary button. If null, do not display the button.

OrderImportantInfoOut.description: Important information on the order - out object.

groupOrder.description:
Order of this group within all groups (1-based index).
From oldest to newest redelivery.
The first group (Order = 1) contains the state changes for the original delivery,
the second group (Order = 2) contains the state changes for the first redelivery, and so on.

orderStateChanges.description: List of state changes for this redelivery group.

OrderStateChangeGroupOut.description: Represents a group of order state changes grouped by redelivery.

orderInGroup.description:
Numeric order representing the sequence of state changes in chronological order (ascending by creation datetime) in group.
Order = 1 is the oldest state change, Order increases for more recent changes.

orderInTrackAndTrace.description:
Numeric order representing the sequence of state changes in chronological order (ascending by creation datetime) in whole track and trace info.
Order = 1 is the oldest state change, Order increases for more recent changes.

active.description:
Indicates whether this state change is the actual/current state (true) or a historical state change (false).
Only the most recent state change has this property set to true.

OrderStateChangeOut.description: REST output object for order state change information.

url.description: Url to dedicated Track and Trace web.

orderStateChangeGroups.description: List of state change groups grouped by redelivery.

updated.description: Updated information showing the last update timestamp.

ValidateOrderIdentificationSourceInput.description: Identification of input source on the machine.

ValidateOrderInput.description: API input object for parcel validation webhook.

rejectionReason.description: Text message with a reason why package is not valid.

localizedRejectionReason.description: Localized text message with a reason why package is not valid.

barcode.description: Customer input or scanned barcode containing information about the package.

returnGroup.description: Defining the return group to which the parcel belongs to.

ValidateOrderOut.description: API output object for parcel validation webhook.

height.description: Height of the package in cm.

width.description: Width of the package in cm.

depth.description: Depth of the package in cm.

weight.description: Weight of the package in kg.

ValidateOrderPackageInfoOut.description: Represents the dimensions of a package in centimeters.

manualCapture.description:
Manual Capture - if true, on the box payment will be only authorized and the actual transfer (capture) will need to be done manually be the caller.
If false, the funds will be transferred to the shopper as soon as the payment on the box completes.

ValidateOrderPaymentInformationOut.description: Info about payment information for a parcel.

ValidateOrderSupportedLanguageInput.description: Represents the supported languages in AlzaBox (ISO 639-1 codes).

OAuth2.description:
IMPORTANT NOTE: If you do not specify any scope in the authentication request
                        then generated access token gets all scopes the specified client_id is authorized for.
                        This behavior is by design by Duende.

Bearer.description: Please enter access token directly as an alternative to previous approaches
